name: CMozGlow
description: Beginner-friendly WS2812B/NeoPixel library for ESP32 boards (S3, S2, C3 and classic). Plain-English error handling, automatic power budgeting for wearables, live status pixel, async RMT engine, optional dual-core AutoPilot mode, and ten fashion-tech effects including a Morse messenger.
keywords: ws2812b, neopixel, led, esp32, esp32-s3, wearable, e-textiles, fashion-tech, rmt, addressable
